name: USS PC-1259 (PC-1259)
events: 21 Jul 1945 At 1134 K/21, USS Lionfish (T/Lt.Cdr. B.M. Ganyard, USN) makes rendezvous with USS PC-1259 (Lt. T.H. Engelhardt, Jr., USNR) which is to escort her to Saipan.

At 1552 K/21, USS Lionfish moors alongside USS Orion (T/Capt. E.R. Hannon, USN) at Tenapag harbour, Saipan. She is then taken in hand for minor repairs. She also commenced embarking 16 torpedoes and 52845 gallons of fuel.
5 Aug 1945 After fuelling, USS Batfish (Lt.Cdr. W.L. Small, USN), departed Iwo Jima to resume her 7th war patrol. She was escorted out by USS PC-1259 (Lt. T.H. Engelhardt, Jr., USNR).
